prompt: 2x2 grid, 4 decades of a human life as typographic decade numerals Anchor: [Decade Numeral] :: [Life Stage / Decade (e.g., Childhood 10s / Midlife 40s / Old Age 70s)] :: 4 Morphology: 3D typographic sculpture of [Decade Numeral], form assembled from a dense pile of [Life Stage] objects — the physical texture of daily life at that age: toys, tools, documents, comfort objects, medical items, hobby equipment — nostalgic, honest, legible :: 3 Material Physics: Textures faithful to the objects of that life stage: worn plastic, laminated paper, soft cotton, scratched metal, prescription-bottle translucent orange, aged photo print; scale and wear appropriate to how those objects are actually held and used :: 3 Illumination: Warm domestic lighting — like afternoon sun through a home window, soft fill from the opposite side, clean light background :: 2 Render Stack: Cinema 4D render, front-facing, 8k, tactile domestic-material shaders :: 1 Negative: [Illegible, 2D, flat, generic stock-photo aesthetic, floating, clinical or cold lighting, objects not specific to the age] :: -1
